office_does: The county clerk maintains superior-court records, processes filings and court orders, and supports public access to the court system.
race_blurb: Deputy clerk Garrett Cady emphasizes direct office systems experience, while Nicole Miller emphasizes broader public-service management, accessibility, and workplace culture.

candidates.summary: Miller brings nearly 30 years in public service and proposes expanded in-person access, backlog reduction, and workplace improvements.
highlights: Reports nearly 30 years in public service, child welfare, juvenile justice, and equity administration [S1]
Would expand access, address backlogs, and improve workplace culture [S1][S2]

experience.basis: She has a long public-service management record, though not direct clerk-office service.

candidates.summary: Cady is a deputy clerk with court-systems experience who emphasizes access, staff retention, restored assistance, and continuity.
highlights: Works as a deputy clerk and has experience in the office's principal information systems [S1]
Prioritizes access, retention, restored domestic-violence assistance, and in-person service [S1][S2]

experience.basis: He has direct deputy-clerk and court-systems experience.
